title: Eastern Mediterranean, Proxy War
briefing: DEFCON 4. Two non-state actors patrol the Eastern Mediterranean — the Crescent Falcons (Opp-sponsored) and the Dawn Volunteers (US-sponsored). Both great powers can fund their proxies, sanction the other, or strike. Tension is driven by proxy autonomy and radicalization. Choose whether escalation runs through your proxy or against theirs.
gdelt_query: "Eastern Mediterranean" OR Cyprus OR Lebanon OR proxy OR militia
opening_message: Two rival proxies are active in theater: Crescent Falcons (Opp-sponsored) and Dawn Volunteers (US-sponsored). Fund, sanction, or strike — each choice shifts the proxy balance.

win_conditions.disarm: Cut support to your proxy AND reduce DEFCON to ≤ 3.
win_conditions.mutual_assured_destruction: A freelance strike by an unsponsored proxy drags both patrons in within 2 turns.
